notes: Solid Tetris implementation with ghost piece, next preview, scoring, leveling, wall kicks, and DAS; minor issue with soft drop using timer multiplication instead of proper interval scaling, and DAS repeat rate logic has a subtle bug (moveTimer set to 100 instead of resetting), but overall very playable.
An exceptionally well-crafted Tetris clone with flawless logic, proper DAS (Delayed Auto Shift) for smooth movement, ghost pieces, wall kicks, and accurate scoring/leveling mechanics.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris with scoring, levels, next piece, pause, ghost, and line clears, but it lacks polish and standard behaviors like robust rotation/wall kicks and uses Space for both start/restart and hard drop.
